message:
test(fuzz): add 5 fuzz targets for text subsystem

Expand fuzzing coverage for the text crate with targets exercising
different code paths in isolation:

- fuzz_text_cluster_map: grapheme cluster boundary detection and
  byte-range mapping under arbitrary Unicode input
- fuzz_text_hyphenation: hyphenation break-point selection across
  varied word structures and locale settings
- fuzz_text_shaped_layout: end-to-end shaped text layout under
  random font metrics and input strings
- fuzz_text_width: Unicode width calculation for mixed-script and
  emoji-heavy inputs
- fuzz_text_wrap: line-wrapping logic under varied constraints
  including zero-width and maximal-width edge cases

Wire all 5 targets into fuzz/Cargo.toml with ftui-text and ftui-style
as dependencies.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -18,6 +18,12 @@ path = "../crates/ftui-core"
 [dependencies.frankenterm-core]
 path = "../crates/frankenterm-core"
 
+[dependencies.ftui-text]
+path = "../crates/ftui-text"
+
+[dependencies.ftui-style]
+path = "../crates/ftui-style"
+
 [[bin]]
 name = "fuzz_input_parser"
 path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_input_parser.rs"
@@ -53,6 +59,41 @@ test = false
 doc = false
 bench = false
 
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_text_cluster_map"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_text_cluster_map.rs"
+test = false
+doc = false
+bench = false
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_text_shaped_layout"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_text_shaped_layout.rs"
+test = false
+doc = false
+bench = false
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_text_wrap"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_text_wrap.rs"
+test = false
+doc = false
+bench = false
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_text_width"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_text_width.rs"
+test = false
+doc = false
+bench = false
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_text_hyphenation"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_text_hyphenation.rs"
+test = false
+doc = false
+bench = false
+
 [profile.release]
 opt-level = 3
 debug = true
